reasoning: Base hue is a rich saturated mid-green that dominates decisively — bright, warm-outdoor Hyrule feel, not muted or grey-dungeon. Candy-pink/salmon flower accents are palette-consistent (match coral/salmon swatches in reference sheet) and carry the required warmth pop. Warm orange-tan secondary patches reinforce warm undertones. Internal tone count: deep green, mid green, lighter green, pink/salmon, warm tan/orange, off-white — roughly 6 tones, squarely in the 6–12 normal range. No pure-black or cold-grey shadows visible; darker areas use deeper green not achromatic black. Minor issue: scattered white/near-white patches read slightly cool rather than warm cream — could benefit from a slight warm ivory tint to prevent any cold intrusion, but area coverage is small enough not to break overall harmony. Palette compatibility is high: all dominant hues appear in or adjacent to the Echoes-tuned reference swatches. Mood verdict: BRIGHT/WARM. Passes threshold at 8.
